metadata.website_type: international logistics and shipping services website

tasks.name: Get the cheapest 4-day international shipping quote from Chicago to Paris and start a shipment
tasks.description: Generate a shipping quote for a 10 kg box from Chicago (60601, USA) to Paris (75001, France), filter for services that deliver in 4 business days or less, select the cheapest option, and proceed to shipment details.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the "Ship" or "Get a Quote" link in the top navigation bar.
In the origin section, click the city field and type "Chicago", then enter ZIP code "60601" and select "United States" from the country dropdown.
In the destination section, click the city field and type "Paris", then enter postal code "75001" and select "France" from the country dropdown.

In the package details section, select "Box" as the package type, enter "10" in the weight field, choose "kg" as the unit, and enter "40", "30", and "20" in the length, width, and height fields respectively (in centimeters).
Use the shipment date picker to select the next Monday on the calendar, then close the date picker.
Open the "Delivery time" filter and select the option that limits results to services delivering in "4 business days or less".
Open the sort dropdown above the results list and choose "Price: Low to High" from the sorting options.

In the sorted results list, click the "Select" or "Choose" button for the first service shown (the cheapest option within 4 business days) and then click the "Continue to Shipment Details" button to proceed.

tasks.name: Create and pay for an economy international document shipment from Toronto to New York under $40
tasks.description: Set up a document shipment from Toronto (M5H 2N2, Canada) to New York (10019, USA), filter for services costing $40 USD or less, choose an economy option within that price, and complete payment with a credit card.
steps: From the homepage, click the "Create Shipment" button in the main banner or top navigation.
On the start shipment page, select the option to continue as a guest (e.g., click "Continue as Guest" or "Ship without an account").
In the "From" address section, enter "Toronto" as the city, select "Canada" as the country, type postal code "M5H 2N2", and fill in a sender name (e.g., "Alex Chen").
In the "To" address section, enter "New York" as the city, select "United States" as the country, type postal code "10019", and fill in a recipient name (e.g., "Jamie Smith").
In the package information area, choose "Documents" as the shipment type, enter "3" as the weight, and select "kg" as the weight unit.
Click the "Show Services" or "Get Rates" button to load available shipping services.
In the price filter panel, click the maximum price field, type "40" as the value in USD, and click the "Apply" or similar button to filter services to $40 or less.
From the filtered list, locate a service labeled "Economy" or "Standard" and click its "Select" or "Choose" button.

On the payment page, select "Credit or Debit Card" as the payment method, enter "4242424242424242" as the card number, "12/30" as the expiry date, "123" as the security code, fill in any required billing name and address fields, and click the "Pay and Generate Label" button.

tasks.name: Schedule the earliest afternoon pickup on Friday for four pre-labeled packages in Madrid
tasks.description: Arrange a courier pickup in Madrid (28001, Spain) for 4 already-labeled packages, choosing the earliest available pickup time slot on the upcoming Friday that starts at or after 14:00.
steps: On the homepage, click the "Schedule Pickup" option in the main navigation or tools section.
On the pickup type page, select the option indicating that you already have shipping labels (e.g., click "I already have a shipping label").

In the pickup address form, enter a contact name (e.g., "Laura García"), type a street address in central Madrid (e.g., "Calle de Alcalá 10"), enter postal code "28001", and select "Spain" as the country.
In the pickup details section, enter "4" as the number of packages and "25" as the total weight, then choose "kg" as the weight unit.
Open the date picker and select the upcoming Friday on the calendar as the pickup date.
In the available time slots list for that Friday, choose the earliest time slot whose start time is 14:00 (2:00 PM) or later (e.g., select "14:00–16:00" if available).
In the contact information area, enter phone number "+34 600 000 000" and an email address (e.g., "laura@example.com") in their respective fields.
Click the "Schedule Pickup" or "Confirm Pickup" button to submit the pickup request.

tasks.name: Estimate customs duties for clothing from Los Angeles to Tokyo and select a prepaid duties option under $60
tasks.description: Use the customs and duties estimator to calculate charges for sending clothing valued at $250 from Los Angeles (90001, USA) to Tokyo (100-0001, Japan), then choose a shipping option that includes prepaid duties where the estimated duties are $60 USD or less and save the estimate.
steps: From the homepage, open the "Tools" or "More" menu and click the "Customs & Duties Estimator" link.
In the origin section, select "United States" from the country dropdown, type "Los Angeles" in the city field, and enter postal code "90001".
In the destination section, select "Japan" from the country dropdown, type "Tokyo" in the city field, and enter postal code "100-0001".
In the shipment contents area, open the category dropdown, choose "Clothing & Apparel", then type "3 cotton shirts" in the detailed description field.
Enter "250" in the total customs value field, select "USD" as the currency, and choose "Personal gift" from the shipment purpose dropdown.
Click the "Calculate duties and taxes" or similarly labeled button to generate the estimate.
In the displayed shipping options, locate an option that offers "Prepay duties and taxes" with an estimated duties amount of $60 USD or less and click its associated "Select" or "Choose" button.
On the option details page, check the box labeled "Include prepaid duties in shipping charges" or similar to confirm prepaid duties.
Click the "Save Estimate" or "Save Quote" button to store this duties-inclusive option for later use.

tasks.name: Find the nearest Berlin drop-off location open after 19:00 and save it
tasks.description: Locate a parcel drop-off point within 5 km of Berlin postal code 10117 that accepts international shipments and stays open at or after 20:00 on weekdays, then save it to your locations list.
steps: On the homepage, click the "Locations" or "Find a Location" link in the header navigation.
In the location search box, type "Berlin 10117, Germany" and press Enter or click the search icon.
In the distance or radius filter control, set the radius to "5 km" and apply the filter.
In the filter panel, check the boxes for "Drop-off location" and "Accepts international shipments" to limit the results.
Open the "Opening hours" or "Hours" filter and select the option that indicates the location is "Open after 19:00 on weekdays".
Above the results list, click the sort dropdown and choose "Distance: nearest first" to sort locations by proximity.
From the filtered list, click on the first location whose listed weekday closing time is 20:00 or later to open its details page.
On the location details page, click the "Copy address" or "Copy to clipboard" button to copy the address.
Click the "Add to Saved Locations" or "Save this location" button to store this drop-off point in your account.

tasks.name: Reschedule delivery to a later evening time window for an in-transit package
tasks.description: Use a tracking number to access an in-transit shipment and change its delivery to the third available future weekday date with an evening delivery window from 18:00–21:00 at the same address.
steps: From the homepage, click the "Track" or "Track Shipment" link in the header.
In the tracking number input field, type "ZX123456789US" and press Enter or click the "Track" button.
On the tracking details page, click the "Change delivery", "Manage delivery", or similar link for modifying delivery options.
On the delivery options page, choose the option labeled "Reschedule delivery date" or equivalent.
In the calendar or date selection list, select the third available future weekday date offered for rescheduling.
In the list of time windows, select an evening slot labeled "18:00–21:00" or the closest available option within that time range.
Leave the current delivery address unchanged and, in the delivery instructions text area, type "Please ring doorbell only once.".
Click the "Save Changes" or "Confirm new delivery" button to submit the updated delivery schedule.

tasks.name: Create a business sender address in Shanghai and save an express shipment draft to an existing London recipient with $500 insurance
tasks.description: Add a new business sender address for "Dragon Exports Ltd" in Shanghai (200001, China), then use it to start an express international shipment to an existing recipient "Acme Corp, London, United Kingdom" with a declared value of $500 and insurance, saving the shipment as a draft instead of purchasing.
steps: From the homepage, click "My Account" in the header and then select "Address Book" from the account menu.
On the Address Book page, click the "Add New Address" button.
In the address type selector, choose "Business", then enter "Dragon Exports Ltd" as the company name.

Fill in the address fields with "88 Nanjing Road" as the street, "Shanghai" as the city, "200001" as the postal code, select "China" as the country, and enter phone number "+86 21 5555 0000", then click the "Save" or "Add Address" button.
In the list of saved addresses, locate the new "Dragon Exports Ltd" entry and click its "Ship from this address" or similar action link.
On the Create Shipment page that opens, go to the recipient section and open the saved recipients dropdown, then select "Acme Corp, London, United Kingdom" from the list.
In the service selection area, choose an "Express" or "Priority" service that indicates an estimated delivery time of 3 business days or less.
In the shipment value or insurance section, enter "500" as the declared value in USD and check the option labeled "Add full-value insurance" or equivalent.
Scroll to the bottom of the page and click the "Save as Draft" or "Save without buying label" button instead of any purchase button.

tasks.name: Choose an Amsterdam-to-Sydney service with low carbon emissions under $100
tasks.description: Create a quote for a 2 kg box from Amsterdam (1012 AB, Netherlands) to Sydney (2000, Australia), then filter services to those with a carbon footprint of 15 kg CO₂ or less and a price of $100 USD or less, finally selecting the fastest option that meets both criteria.
steps: On the homepage, click the "Ship" or "Get a Quote" option in the main navigation.
In the origin section, enter "Amsterdam" as the city, type postal code "1012 AB", and select "Netherlands" as the country.
In the destination section, enter "Sydney" as the city, type postal code "2000", and select "Australia" as the country.
In the package details area, select "Box" as the package type, enter "2" as the weight, select "kg" as the weight unit, and enter "30", "20", and "10" as the length, width, and height in centimeters.
Click the "Show Services" or "Get Rates" button to load available shipping services.
If available, toggle on the "Show environmental impact" or "Show CO₂" switch to display carbon emissions for each service.
Open the "Carbon footprint" or "CO₂" filter, set the maximum value to "15" kg CO₂, and apply the filter.
Open the price filter, enter "100" as the maximum price in USD, and apply the price filter.
Use the sort dropdown above the results to select "Fastest delivery" as the sorting option.
From the filtered and sorted list, click the "Select" or "Choose" button for the first service shown (the fastest option with emissions at or below 15 kg CO₂ and price at or below $100).

entities.name: Address
entities.description: Postal/contact address used for senders, recipients, billing, and pickups; also serves as Address Book entries when saved_in_address_book is true.

entities.name: Shipment
entities.description: Shipment record including selected service, route, pricing, insurance, and status (draft, in transit, etc.).

entities.name: ShipmentQuote
entities.description: Temporary quote/search request capturing route, package details, filters, and selected service.

entities.name: ShippingService
entities.description: Catalog of service products (Economy, Express, etc.) with general capabilities.

entities.name: ShippingRateOption
entities.description: Concrete service option returned for a specific quote, with price, transit time, and CO₂ impact.

entities.name: Payment
entities.description: Payment transaction for purchasing a shipment and generating labels.

entities.name: PickupRequest
entities.description: Scheduled courier pickup for one or more packages, including pre-labeled shipments.

entities.name: PickupTimeSlot
entities.description: Available pickup time windows for a given date and area (used to select earliest slot after a time).

entities.name: CustomsEstimate
entities.description: Estimated duties and taxes for a shipment, including selected prepaid-duties option when applicable.

entities.name: Location
entities.description: Drop-off/pickup/service points with address, opening hours, and capabilities.

entities.name: SavedLocation
entities.description: Locations saved by the single user for quick access.

entities.name: TrackingEvent
entities.description: Individual tracking scans and status updates for shipments.

entities.name: DeliveryTimeSlot
entities.description: Available delivery rescheduling windows (e.g., evening 18:00–21:00) for specific shipments and dates.

entities.name: DeliveryRescheduleRequest
entities.description: Change requests for rescheduling shipment delivery date/time and updating instructions.
